description: Backend data contract for Scan Logs page – real‑time log of QR code scan events with stats, filtering, pagination, and export.

getStats.description: Get summary statistics for today's scans (total, success, failed, average response time).

getScans.description: Fetch paginated list of scan logs with filtering and search.

queryParams.result: enum: ALL, SUCCESS, INVALID, REVOKED, EXPIRED, RATE_LIMITED, ERROR (optional, default ALL)
queryParams.search: string (optional, searches student name, city, token hash)
queryParams.sortBy: string (optional, default created_at desc: created_at, response_time_ms)

scans.result: enum: SUCCESS, INVALID, REVOKED, EXPIRED, RATE_LIMITED, ERROR

getFilterOptions.description: Available result types for filter dropdown (based on system configuration or actual data).

exportScans.description: Export filtered scan logs as CSV (same query params as getScans, pagination ignored).
exportScans.response: CSV file download with columns: id, token_hash, result, student_name, ip_address, ip_city, device, scan_purpose, response_time_ms, created_at

fieldNotes.token_hash: Should be masked on frontend (first 4 + last 4 characters).
fieldNotes.student_name: May be null if token is not assigned to a student.
fieldNotes.ip_city: Derived from IP address using a geolocation service; optional but recommended for display.
fieldNotes.device: Derived from User-Agent header; frontend uses the first part (e.g., 'Chrome') for icon and second part (e.g., 'Android') for OS.
fieldNotes.response_time_ms: Time taken by the scanner to process the token; used for performance monitoring.
fieldNotes.avgResponseTimeMs: Returned as string with unit (e.g., '142ms') to match UI display.
